prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room, warm warning lights, storm outside. Noel Aster, a feminine chef in a white jacket with rolled sleeves, holds a heavy metal panel steady. Noel Nightingale, a feminine mysterious guest in a dark tailored coat and half-dry gloves, uses a repair tool on the panel. Cooperative, focused, stable camera, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot; Noel Nightingale completes the adjustment with the tool while Noel Aster maintains a firm grip on the panel. The warm warning lights stabilize into steady illumination. Consistent lighting, storm reflections on glass, cinematic anime style, no text, no watermark.
